name: APM
description: An All-Atom Generative Model for Designing Protein Complexes. Precisely models inter-chain interactions by integrating all-atom information.
capabilities: An All-Atom Generative Model for Designing Protein Complexes
Precisely models inter-chain interactions by integrating all-atom information

pdbFile.description: Input protein complex structure in PDB format

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target protein chains

numDesigns.description: Number of complex designs to generate
